title: Tax Calculator
subtitle: Estimate tax for income earned in tax year {{taxYear}} (declaration filed by {{filingDeadline}}). Free, no account required.
otherIncomeHint: Rental income, crypto gains, freelance, etc.
noInputError: Enter at least one value to calculate your taxes.
earlyFilingDiscount: File by {{deadline}} to save {{amount}} {{currency}} ({{rate}}% discount on income tax)
whatIfIntro: See how your total tax changes if you realize an extra gain or harvest a loss within this tax year.
cassCliffCallout: {{scenario}} lands in the {{bracket}} CASS bracket, adding {{amount}} {{currency}} of CASS compared with {{other}}.
cassStepExplainer: CASS is owed as a fixed amount per bracket (a step function), so income realized just over a threshold can add a whole lump to your total.
